name: cloudprice-mcp
summary: The Green FinOps MCP server: multi-cloud cost AND carbon comparison for AI assistants. RI break-even, multi-cloud TCO, migration, egress arbitrage, spot pricing, cost drift detection, carbon footprint (kg CO2e), weekly auto-refreshed catalog + dated snapshots across AWS / Azure / GCP / OCI. 19 tools, 7 AI clients.
